WHAT THIS PROGRAM DELIVERS

01

Expert Judgment at Scale

Encode AXA XL's adjuster expertise into jurisdiction-specific rules. Apply it consistently at speed: at first notice, on every claim, regardless of volume or adjuster availability.

02

AXA XL-Owned Intelligence

The platform deploys within AXA XL's infrastructure. All claim data stays in the environment. Designated administrators operate and extend the intelligence layer independently, with no ongoing Elevatenow dependency.

03

Defensible, Auditable Decisions

Every triage decision traces to a governed rule: jurisdiction, coverage trigger, filing deadline. Regulator-ready audit export at the claim level from day one. When examiners ask, the answer is a click.

04

Continuous Improvement, No Vendor Lock

AXA XL administrators update jurisdiction rules, activate new LOBs, and run quarterly knowledge refreshes independently. Elevatenow trains the team and steps back. The intelligence layer is AXA XL's to operate.

What Success Looks Like

01

Scale Adjuster Expertise Across Every Claim

Expert-quality triage on 100% of FNOLs from day one

Jurisdiction-specific rules encode expert adjuster judgment at intake


Applied at first notice on every FNOL, regardless of volume or geography


Coverage triggers, filing deadlines, and severity thresholds evaluated in seconds


Consistent triage quality across all adjusters and claim types


Expert outcomes stop depending on who picks up the case




02

Accelerate Claims Throughput Without Adding Headcount

Claims ops capacity scales with volume, not headcount

Every claim enters the right workflow at intake with no manual sorting


Adjusters focus on judgment calls, not first-notice classification


High-severity and complex claims escalate automatically from intake


Throughput scales with claim volume, not with team size


No additional headcount needed to absorb volume growth




03

Build a Defensible Audit Trail from First Notice

Regulator-ready decision records at the claim level

Every decision traces to a specific jurisdiction rule and coverage trigger


Filing deadlines and statutory requirements logged at the claim level


Regulator-ready audit export available on demand, no manual reconstruction


Answer to any examiner question is a click, not a multi-system search


Designed for regulator, litigation, and internal review from day one





04

Expand Across All LOBs Without New Procurement

Each new LOB live in 4 weeks on the platform AXA XL already owns

Master agreement signed once, governs all future LOBs


Each new LOB activates via a one-page Order Form


4-week enablement sprint per new line of business


No new vendor review, no infrastructure to rebuild


Intelligence layer compounds: each LOB reinforces the shared knowledge base

COMMERCIAL TERMS

What AXA XL Retains · How the Commercial Relationship Works

WHAT AXA XL RETAINS

Platform runs on AXA XL infrastructure. All claim data stays within AXA XL's environment.


AXA XL administrators operate the configuration environment from go-live.


All FNOL decision records, claim traces, and jurisdiction audit logs.


Source code escrow releases to AXA XL on Elevatenow dissolution.


Right to configure and extend triage rules independently.





COMMERCIAL STRUCTURE

Master License Agreement signed once. Annual platform access auto-renews.


Each new LOB is a one-page Order Form. No renegotiation of the master agreement.


Optional document intelligence layer at consumption-based pricing, or bring your own.


Dedicated support arrangements available on request for teams requiring expanded engagement.


Elevatenow retains platform source code, FNOL knowledge base, and all platform IP.


Elevatenow retains right to deploy the platform with other carriers.






CONFIDENTIAL · AXA XL INTERNAL REVIEW ONLY

June 2026 · enCODE Platform

ENCODE · PROPERTY LOB

AXA XL's existing pipeline delivers structured FNOL data to enCODE. Elevatenow applies triage intelligence at the API boundary with no overlap with AXA XL's current intake operations.

TRACK A

FNOL Intelligence Core

LANE 1 · ELEVATENOW

Platform Vendor

Intake · triage intelligence · knowledge layer

LANE 2 · JOINT

Collaborative

Triage logic · integration · testing · enablement

LANE 3 · AXA XL

Internal

Infrastructure · business ownership · operations

Platform Deployment

Deployed on AXA XL infrastructure to Elevatenow spec. Readiness confirmed before project clock starts.

Property Triage Rules

Jurisdiction-specific rule set: cause of loss, coverage triggers, state deadlines, reserve indicators.

Knowledge Layer + Quarterly Updates

Property coverage logic and jurisdiction frameworks. Versioned updates self-applied by AXA XL administrators.

60-Day Go-Live Support

Active support through handover. No ongoing vendor access required post-handover.

Triage Logic Definition

Joint workshops define the Property decision tree. Output is what Elevatenow encodes into the rule set.

Claims System Integration

Triage decisions written to AXA XL claims system via REST API. AXA XL implements the write-back.

End-to-End Testing & Acceptance

Full chain validated from intake through triage to write-back.

Administrator Enablement

Elevatenow delivers enablement program. AXA XL administrators operate platform independently from handover.

Infrastructure Provisioning

INTEGRATION BOUNDARY

AXA XL delivers structured FNOL events to the enCODE triage API. Elevatenow provides the payload schema; AXA XL owns upstream extraction and field mapping.

Elevatenow · Confidential · For AXA XL Internal Review Only · June 2026

gps@elevatenow.tech · elevatenow.tech

Claim Intake API

REST API accepts pre-structured FNOL payload from AXA XL pipeline. Elevatenow provides the full payload schema.

FNOL Payload Schema Alignment

AXA XL maps source data fields to enCODE API schema. Elevatenow validates mapping before integration testing.

Databases, firewall, and API gateway configured to Elevatenow spec before deployment clock starts.

FNOL Document Intake Pipeline

AXA XL pipeline extracts and normalizes inbound Property FNOLs and delivers structured events to enCODE API.

Business Requirements

AXA XL claims leadership defines Property triage decision criteria. This input is what Elevatenow encodes.

Post-Handover Operations

AXA XL administrators run enCODE configuration environment. Quarterly updates self-applied.

Audit and Data Governance

All FNOL decisions and logs retained within AXA XL infrastructure. No data leaves AXA XL environment.

LANE 1 · ELEVATENOW

LANE 2 · JOINT

LANE 3 · AXA XL

Internal

Infrastructure · business ownership · operations

Platform Deployment

Deployed on AXA XL infrastructure to Elevatenow spec. Readiness confirmed before project clock starts.

FNOL Document Intake

Inbound Property FNOLs via email and attachment. Elevatenow extracts structured fields and normalizes to triage schema.

Property Triage Rules

Jurisdiction-specific rule set: cause of loss, coverage triggers, state deadlines, reserve indicators.

Knowledge Layer + Quarterly Updates

Property coverage logic and jurisdiction frameworks. Versioned updates self-applied by AXA XL administrators.

60-Day Go-Live Support

Active support through handover. No ongoing vendor access required post-handover.

Triage Logic Definition

Joint workshops define the Property decision tree. Output is what Elevatenow encodes into the rule set.

Claims System Integration

Triage decisions written to AXA XL claims system via REST API. AXA XL implements the write-back.

End-to-End Testing

Full chain validated from intake through triage to write-back. Pass/fail criteria agreed upfront.

Administrator Enablement

Elevatenow delivers enablement program. AXA XL administrators operate platform independently from handover.

Go-Live Acceptance

AXA XL claims ops validates triage output against adjuster standards. Acceptance triggers handover milestone.

Infrastructure Provisioning

Databases, firewall, and API gateway configured to Elevatenow spec before deployment clock starts.
* Email/attachment processing infrastructure runs within AXA XL environment as a direct pass-through cost.

Business Requirements

AXA XL claims leadership defines Property triage decision criteria. This input is what Elevatenow encodes.

Post-Handover Operations

AXA XL administrators run enCODE configuration environment. Quarterly updates self-applied.

Audit and Data Governance

All FNOL decisions and logs retained within AXA XL infrastructure. No data leaves AXA XL environment.

INTEGRATION BOUNDARY

Elevatenow receives FNOL documents and drives the full triage chain. AXA XL claims system receives the decision via API. Integration point is the claims system write-back.
